market_brief.brief: Welcome. U.S. equities: S&P +0.28%, Nasdaq +0.79%, Dow -0.45%. Technology led sectors (+1.62%) while Industrials lagged (-2.00%). GPT-5.4 led the day at +2.79%. 6 of 6 models green on the day. Cumulative leader: DeepSeek Reasoner at +11.28%. Key headline: US wholesale prices surged 4% last month after the war in Iran sent energy prices soaring - AP News — market reaction muted.
